description: Remaining work from the original hex-nexus workplan — E2E integration tests and uncommitted stabilization

tasks.name: Stage and commit hex-nexus extraction
tasks.description: hex-nexus/ is a new crate extracted from hex-hub/ (lib vs binary split). All source files are untracked or modified. Stage hex-nexus/, updated hex-hub/, and root Cargo.toml workspace changes. Commit as a single logical unit.

tasks.name: Stage and commit new hex-agent files
tasks.description: Several hex-agent files are untracked: build.rs, lib.rs, hub_client.rs, rl_client.rs, migrate.rs, rl port, hook_dispatch, skill_trigger, tests/. Commit these additions.

tasks.name: Verify workspace builds cleanly
tasks.description: Run 'cargo build --workspace' and fix any compilation errors in hex-agent, hex-hub, hex-nexus, hex-desktop. Ensure feature flags (spacetimedb) compile correctly.

tasks.name: Hub-agent spawn test
tasks.description: Test that hex-hub can spawn a hex-agent process, establish WebSocket connection, and exchange heartbeats. Use mock Anthropic endpoint.

tasks.name: Chat round-trip test
tasks.description: Send chat message via WS → hub routes to agent → agent calls mock Anthropic → response streams back via WS. Verify tool_use round-trip.

tasks.name: RL experience recording test
tasks.description: After a successful agent task, verify that an RL experience is recorded in the Q-table and patterns are stored with correct confidence scores.

tasks.name: Workplan multi-phase execution test
tasks.description: Feed a 2-phase workplan JSON to the orchestration API. Verify phases execute in tier order, tasks are tracked, and completion status is reported via WS.
